response.justification: The candidate's resume lacks critical C++ and Windows platform experience required for the role, with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle usage. While they have strong general software development skills, their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB) and languages like D, JavaScript, and Python, with no demonstrable fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain expertise. Their recent roles are at major tech companies (Google, Meta) with no financial services exposure.
strengths: Strong general software engineering skills with experience at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta)
Proficiency in multiple languages and frameworks, demonstrating adaptability
Experience with CI/CD and modern development practices (TDD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No 5–10 years of C++ development on Windows platform as required
No domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
Lacks experience with SQL Server or Oracle (only mentions MongoDB and MySQL)
